do_not_change_yet: Do not promote Mustard X, options agreement, or bottom-channel location logic into normal score partitions.
Do not loosen route locks or giveback protections from this packet; route blocks show saved-money evidence and giveback has no triggered/blocked sample here.
priority_actions: Admit clean shadow specs for Mustard X fresh deep-stack, fresh lone-parent runner, exhausted-parent avoid, and bottom-channel gap-highway long before scoring or changing weights.
Require clean forward samples where gap map, channel/location, and fresh options context are all present; compare options+gap agreement against gap-only after 30 clean samples.
Schedule certified-normal confirmation for Short Genesis; keep it shadow-only until actual/contract-complete evidence confirms ghost expectancy.
agent_reviews.summary: Research-only read: evidence is not promotion-grade. Daily certification is EXPERIMENT_ONLY, Mustard X forward scoring has 30 candidates but 0 entered/0 graded due DATA_UNAVAILABLE, and panel expectancy is ghost-only with 0 actual closed trades.
top_findings: Mustard X is still a shadow/spec problem, not an edge: 30 candidates, 0 entries, 0 graded, all DATA_UNAVAILABLE.
Gap/options agreement is potentially useful but under-covered: 5473 traces, only 78 fully checked; 35 agree-clear vs 20 gap-clear/options-block, while most have no maps or stale/missing options.
Panel expectancy is not live-valid yet: Short Genesis has positive ghost edge, but promotion is blocked by EXPERIMENT_ONLY certification and actual_trades is 0.
watch_next_session: Mustard X candidates with fresh parent lineage, support_stack_depth, lower-channel/location, fresh options, and completed grading.
Whether GAPS_AND_OPTIONS_AGREE_CLEAR produces better realized/ghost R than gap-only cases.
Any actual closed trades that validate or contradict ghost panel expectancy, especially Short Genesis.

do_not_change_yet: Do not loosen daily giveback guard: it did not trigger or block candidates here, so there is no measured basis to tune it.

Do not promote Short Genesis or Mustard hypotheses into normal/live scoring: certification is EXPERIMENT_ONLY, actual trades are 0, and Mustard forward has 30 candidates with 0 graded due to DATA_UNAVAILABLE.
priority_actions: Before next session, require a freshness green check for health, fill reconcile, exit reconcile, trade permissions, route readiness, decision obligation, and ghost ledger before trusting any fire/no-fire conclusion.
Audit direct place_order and bracket entry paths for hard dependency on gate_router, route_lock, source_freshness, daily_pnl_guard, and strategy_id propagation.
Keep route locks hard for gap_reject_short and live_fire_dump until certified-normal forward evidence contradicts the current aggregate loss profile.
agent_reviews.summary: Research-only review: no live broker exposure is visible in this packet. The main execution risk is not current inventory; it is stale operational evidence plus permission surfaces that could allow theory or old state to become live P/L if enforcement assumptions drift.
top_findings: Staleness is the highest execution risk: health is FAIL and several contract sources are stale beyond the RTH limit.

Permission architecture is mostly protective but has call surfaces to keep watching: route_lock_enforce and gate_router_enforce are true, while trade_permission_enforce and legacy_trade_permission_enforce are false.
Route locks appear money-protective: gate effectiveness shows 1182 graded blocked candidates at -264.447R total.
watch_next_session: Any order/fill appearing while broker_reconcile still reports broker_connected=false or stale reconcile inputs.
Any nontradable or experiment route producing an actual order despite route_lock_enforce=true.
Giveback guard first real trigger: measure saved_loss_r vs missed_profit_r.

do_not_change_yet: Do not promote Short Genesis despite positive ghost edge; promotion_gate correctly blocks it under EXPERIMENT_ONLY with 0 actual trades.
Do not loosen route locks or core giveback/daily guards from this packet; gate evidence is mostly blocked/ghost research, not certified realized execution evidence.
priority_actions: Add or verify a single immutable trace key that joins panel score, pick, freshness checks, decision, route gate, order id, fill id, exit id, realized R/PnL, and final score partition.
Refresh daily_certification, promotion_gate, gap_options, and health before next session review so EXPERIMENT_ONLY and route/promotion decisions are based on current-source evidence.
Require realized-trade packets to include the decision reason and evidence snapshot used at fire time, not just later summaries.
agent_reviews.summary: The packet is safe as research-only but does not yet prove a full panel-to-score realized execution spine. It has strong ghost/research and gate evidence, but actual closed-trade lineage is absent.
top_findings: Actual execution spine is incomplete in this packet: broker_reconcile has no connected broker/orders/positions, panel_score has 0 actual trades/closed, and mustard_forward has 30 candidates with 0 entered and 0 graded.
Source freshness is uneven: AI learning is fresh, but certification, promotion, gap/options, and health evidence are older.
Attribution is strongest for research gates and ghost scoring, weakest for realized causality.
watch_next_session: Whether actual trades appear with non-null order/fill/exit/realized fields and preserve the same trace_id from candidate through score.
Whether gap/options agreement improves from sparse/stale coverage to fresh fully checked attribution on traded symbols.
Whether DATA_UNAVAILABLE errors on mustard_forward disappear.

do_not_change_yet: Do not promote options/gap agreement into scoring or routing; certification is EXPERIMENT_ONLY and evidence is mostly missing/stale.
Do not loosen parent shelf or Mustard filters based on this packet; forward outcomes are ungraded.
priority_actions: Define one clean shadow spec for options+gap clear-highway agreement: require fresh options map, valid parent gap map, channel/location tag, measured MFE/MAE/realized R, and compare against gap-only controls after 30 clean samples.
Track agreement buckets separately: clear/clear, gap-clear-options-block, options-clear-gap-block, mixed, gaps-missing, options-missing, stale-options.
For parent shelves, separate fresh deep-stack, fresh lone-parent runner, exhausted parent avoid, and no-parent-edge into distinct shadow cohorts.
agent_reviews.summary: Research-only read: auction/options context is promising but not yet decision-grade. Gap/options agreement is mostly absent or stale, parent shelf theses are ungraded, and the options thesis is measurable only as an admitted shadow test with clean coverage and forward R outcomes.
top_findings: Coverage gap dominates: 5473 traces, but only 78 fully checked; most cases have missing gaps, missing options, stale options, or no maps.
Where checked, agreement exists but is thin: enough for a shadow hypothesis, not promotion.
Parent shelf / Mustard evidence is not measurable yet: mustard_forward has 30 candidates, 0 entered, 0 graded, all DATA_UNAVAILABLE.
watch_next_session: Freshness rate: options_not_fresh and options_missing must fall before options walls can be trusted.
Whether clear-highway agreement improves avg realized/ghost R over gap-only picks after clean samples.
Whether exhausted parents underperform fresh parent shelves once data availability returns.

do_not_change_yet: Do not promote Mustard X, options/gap agreement, bottom-channel location, or Short Genesis into normal/live scoring yet.
Do not loosen route locks, giveback guard, or core safety gates from this review.
Do not treat stale/missing options maps as evidence against or for the options thesis.
money_risks: Stale contract sources can make a true-looking dashboard read misrepresent live reality.
Direct order/bracket call surfaces remain the place where a good theory can become bad P/L if a path bypasses route lock and strategy attribution.
The options/gap thesis can look smart while still being untradeable unless missing/stale maps are excluded from the sample.
open_questions: Can Mustard X forward scoring eliminate DATA_UNAVAILABLE and produce clean entered/graded shadow samples?
Does options+gap agreement beat gap-only when both maps are fresh and fully checked?
Can the next actual closed trades preserve one trace id from panel/pick through realized score?
priority_actions: Before next session, refresh and verify health, certification, promotion gate, gap/options, fill/exit reconcile, permissions, route readiness, decision obligation, and ghost ledger.
Make the next evidence goal clean forward samples, not new strategy expansion: Mustard X, options+gap agreement, bottom-channel highway, and Short Genesis confirmation.
Verify direct place_order/bracket paths depend on route lock, gate router, freshness, daily guard, and strategy_id propagation.
llm_call.synthesis: Live LLM Call: the system is safely research-only, but not promotion-ready. The highest-value next move is freshness and attribution discipline: get clean forward samples for Mustard X and options/gap agreement, verify every actual trade carries one trace id through realized score, and keep route locks/giveback/core gates unchanged until certified realized evidence says otherwise.
watch_next_session: Mustard X: fresh parent lineage, stack depth, lower-channel/location, options context, and completed grading.
Options/gap: fresh fully checked agreement buckets versus gap-only controls.
Spine: actual trades with panel, decision reason, order id, fill id, exit, realized R/PnL, and score partition.
Giveback guard: first real trigger must show saved_loss_r versus missed_profit_r.
Any experiment/nontradable route that somehow reaches an order.

operator_read: Live LLM Call: the system is safely research-only, but not promotion-ready. The highest-value next move is freshness and attribution discipline: get clean forward samples for Mustard X and options/gap agreement, verify every actual trade ca
